name: TerraMind
input_modality: 9 geospatial modalities. Reported sources include Sentinel-1 SAR, Sentinel-2 optical, land-use/land-cover, NDVI/vegetation, DEM/elevation, geographic coordinates, and text/captions.
architecture: 4M-style any-to-any multimodal masked modeling; symmetric Transformer encoder-decoder; dual-scale token-level and pixel-level training; supports Thinking-in-Modalities generation.
downstream_tasks: 9 PANGAEA benchmark tasks: wildfire burn-scar segmentation, marine debris/oil-spill segmentation, agricultural parcel/crop segmentation, flood/water-body segmentation, urban land-cover segmentation, DynamicEarthNet land-cover segmentation, crop-type mapping in South Sudan, SpaceNet7 building/change detection, AI4SmallFarms agricultural segmentation. Also reports zero-shot / generative tasks: land-use segmentation, water-body mapping, vegetation mapping, geolocation, captioning, text-to-image, and modality-to-modality generation.
training_scale: Pretrained on >500B tokens; TerraMesh dataset around 9M samples. Large/base variants reported; training used large-scale GPU/HPC setup.
openness_text: Open source: model weights, code, and pretraining dataset reported as open/permissive.
notes: One of the strongest current EO FMs because it is multimodal, generative, benchmarked, and open.

name: Copernicus-FM
input_modality: 5 major Copernicus/Sentinel streams plus DEM: Sentinel-1 SAR, Sentinel-2 MSI, Sentinel-3 OLCI, Sentinel-5P atmospheric products, DEM/non-spectral metadata.
architecture: Extension of DOFA using dynamic hypernetworks and flexible metadata encodings; ViT-style backbone with sensor-aware dynamic patch embedding.
downstream_tasks: 15 Copernicus-Bench hierarchical tasks: Cloud-S2 segmentation, Cloud-S3 segmentation, EuroSAT-S1 classification, EuroSAT-S2 classification, BigEarthNet-S1 classification, BigEarthNet-S2 classification, LC100Cls-S3 classification, DFC2020-S1 segmentation, DFC2020-S2 segmentation, LC100Seg-S3 segmentation, Flood-S1 change detection, LCZ-S2 classification, Biomass-S3 regression, AQ-NO2-S5P regression, AQ-O3-S5P regression.
training_scale: Copernicus-Pretrain: 18.7M aligned images, about 920B pixels; joint subset around 220K geospatial grids used in reported ViT-Base pretraining.
openness_text: Open source: paper reports code, datasets, and model release.
notes: Broadest Sentinel-specific FM row; includes atmosphere as well as surface tasks.

name: AnySat
input_modality: 11 distinct modalities/sensors: aerial RGB/NIR, aerial RGB/NIR/elevation, SPOT, NAIP, Sentinel-2, Sentinel-1 ascending, Sentinel-1, ALOS, Landsat-7, Landsat-8, MODIS.
architecture: Scale-adaptive Joint Embedding Predictive Architecture (JEPA); modality-specific encoders/tokens projected into a shared latent space.
downstream_tasks: Reported/evaluated tasks include land-cover mapping, tree-species identification, crop-type classification, change detection/deforestation detection, climate-type classification, flood mapping, burn-scar mapping, and segmentation over datasets such as TreeSatAI-TS, PASTIS-HD, FLAIR, PLANTED, BraDD-S1TS, SICKLE, TimeSen2Crop, and Sen1Flood11.
training_scale: Trained on GeoPlex: 5 multimodal datasets and 11 sensors. Public sources reviewed do not report a single token count comparable to TerraMind.
openness_text: Open source: code and checkpoints available.
notes: Strong multimodal representation model; less generative than TerraMind.

name: DOFA
input_modality: Spectral satellite imagery across five EO sensors/modalities; wavelength/band metadata used as conditioning signal.
architecture: Wavelength-conditioned dynamic hypernetwork; shared ViT/MAE-style vision backbone; masked image modeling plus distillation.
downstream_tasks: Evaluated on remote-sensing classification, semantic segmentation, object detection, and change-detection style benchmarks. Representative datasets include GEO-Bench tasks and common RS tasks such as EuroSAT, BigEarthNet, RESISC45, DOTA/DIOR-style detection, land-cover segmentation, and change detection depending on experiment.
training_scale: Paper reports continual / hybrid pretraining across five EO modalities. Exact universal token count is not reported in the public abstract/source reviewed.
openness_text: Open source: code and weights reported.
notes: Important architecture family because later Copernicus-FM extends DOFA.

name: DOFA+
input_modality: Same DOFA idea extended to stronger non-EO and EO initialization; spectral EO images with wavelength-aware conditioning.
architecture: DOFA with neural plasticity and hybrid continual pretraining; wavelength-conditioned dynamic hypernetwork adapted from powerful visual backbones such as DINOv2/ViT.
downstream_tasks: 22 datasets across 4 task families: image classification, semantic segmentation, object detection, and change detection. Named examples: m-BigEarthNet, m-ForestNet, m-Brick-Kiln, m-PV4GER, m-So2Sat, m-EuroSAT; segmentation tasks such as PV4GER-seg, NZ cattle, NeonTree, cashew plantation, South Africa crop type, Chesapeake land-cover; PANGAEA tasks such as burn scars, MADOS marine debris/oil spills, PASTIS, Sen1Floods11, DynamicEarthNet, crop-type mapping, SpaceNet7, AI4SmallFarms; plus RESISC45.
training_scale: DOFA+ reports strong EO adaptation after about 410K EO image tiles; no universal token count reported.
openness_text: Open source / partial: model/code availability reported for DOFA family, but check exact DOFA+ checkpoint license before redistribution.
notes: Good row to separate from DOFA because the training strategy and evaluation scale differ.

name: Galileo
input_modality: Many EO modalities over space and time, including multispectral optical, SAR, elevation, weather, and pseudo-label/auxiliary layers.
architecture: Self-supervised multimodal encoder with masked modeling plus dual global/local contrastive losses.
downstream_tasks: 11 benchmarks across multiple tasks; representative tasks include crop mapping, flood detection, land-cover/land-use classification, segmentation, and multimodal transfer under missing-modality settings.
training_scale: Public abstract/source reviewed does not report a single token count. Uses global multimodal pretraining over space-time EO inputs.
openness_text: Open source: code released under MIT in public repo.
notes: A generalist multimodal EO model; exact modality/task breakdown should be checked from the full paper for final publication table.

name: Prithvi-EO-1.0
input_modality: NASA HLS Landsat + Sentinel-2 harmonized optical multispectral time series at 30 m.
architecture: Masked autoencoder with ViT backbone; spatiotemporal patch embeddings for EO time series.
downstream_tasks: Representative tasks: flood mapping, wildfire burn scar mapping, land-cover classification, crop classification/segmentation, and other HLS-based EO downstream tasks.
training_scale: Pretrained on large HLS time-series corpus. Commonly reported model size: 100M parameters; token count not reported in the same way as TerraMind.
openness_text: Open source: weights and code released by NASA/IBM on Hugging Face/GitHub.
notes: Narrower than multimodal models but a major first-generation open EO FM.

name: Prithvi-EO-2.0
input_modality: NASA HLS Landsat + Sentinel-2 optical multispectral time series at 30 m, with geolocation and date embeddings.
architecture: MAE/ViT with 3D patch embeddings and temporal-location encodings; 300M, 300M-TL, 600M, and 600M-TL variants.
downstream_tasks: 7 named downstream tasks/datasets: Sen1Floods11 flood detection, wildfire scar detection, burn scar intensity, Landslide4Sense landslide detection, US multi-temporal crop segmentation, European multi-temporal land-cover/crop classification, BioMassters above-ground biomass estimation.
training_scale: 4.2M global time-series samples, 45,568 validation samples, >7 years of HLS imagery; 300M and 600M parameter models.
openness_text: Open source: model weights and GitHub code available.
notes: Major upgraded Prithvi row; more robust global training than EO-1.0.

name: TESSERA
input_modality: Sentinel-1 SAR plus Sentinel-2 optical time series; pixel-wise multimodal annual surface representations.
architecture: Pixel-wise EO FM using Barlow Twins self-supervision and sparse temporal sampling; produces compact embeddings rather than only task-specific outputs.
downstream_tasks: Six representative benchmarks: TreeSatAI-TS tree species classification, PASTIS-R parcel segmentation, Austrian Crop classification, BioMassters above-ground biomass regression, Borneo canopy-height regression, Austrian Crop semantic segmentation. General use includes land-cover, crop, biomass, canopy, and environmental monitoring.
training_scale: Produces global annual 10 m embeddings, 128-D latent representation, int8 embedding products; trained over petabyte-scale Sentinel data. Exact token count not reported in reviewed source.
openness_text: Open source: model weights, code, and embeddings/datasets reported as available.
notes: Very relevant because it supplies analysis-ready global embeddings, not only a model checkpoint.

name: AlphaEarth Foundations
input_modality: Multisource EO and geospatial observations: optical, radar, 3D laser/LiDAR-like information, climate, Landsat/Sentinel and other public sources integrated into embedding fields.
architecture: Embedding field model for global mapping from sparse labels; assimilates spatial, temporal, and measurement context into compact annual representations.
downstream_tasks: Evaluated/advertised for classification, regression, change detection, similarity search, land-use/land-cover mapping, ecosystem/habitat mapping, agriculture/crop mapping, and surface property estimation.
training_scale: Trained on petabytes of EO data; released as annual 64-band/64-D embedding fields from 2017 onward at roughly 10 m grid scale; about 16x smaller storage than some alternatives.
openness_text: Partial / closed: embeddings available through Google Earth Engine; full training code/weights not fully open in the same way as TerraMind/Prithvi.
notes: Very strong as an embedding product; less open as a retrainable model.

name: Clay v1.5
input_modality: Multi-sensor imagery and metadata: Sentinel-1, Sentinel-2, Landsat, NAIP, LINZ, MODIS and other satellite/aerial data; includes location, time, GSD, and band metadata.
architecture: Geospatial MAE/ViT with dynamic embedding for arbitrary bands and sensors; two-stage transformer and DINO/teacher-style representation components in v1.5 materials.
downstream_tasks: Embeddings/fine-tuning for classification, regression, generative tasks, crop and land-cover mapping, above-ground biomass/productivity, change detection, deforestation, wildfire, flood, destruction/urban development monitoring.
training_scale: About 70M globally sampled image chips; roughly 6,400 H100 GPU-hours reported for training. Token count not reported in TerraMind-style units.
openness_text: Open source: Apache-2.0-style code/weights model resources reported.
notes: One of the most practically accessible open geospatial FMs.

name: SatMAE
input_modality: Primarily multispectral satellite imagery, with spatial and temporal grouping variants for Sentinel/fMoW-style data.
architecture: Masked Autoencoder adapted to satellite imagery; grouped patch embedding for spectral and temporal structure.
downstream_tasks: Scene classification, land-cover classification, semantic segmentation, and transfer to datasets such as EuroSAT, fMoW-Sentinel, BigEarthNet-style classification, and segmentation datasets.
training_scale: Training uses large RS image corpora such as fMoW-Sentinel/fMoW-RGB depending on variant; exact token count not consistently reported in public summaries.
openness_text: Open source / partial: code and some pretrained weights available in public repos.
notes: Foundational MAE baseline for many later EO FMs.

name: SatMAE++
input_modality: Multispectral and temporal satellite image streams; focuses on spectral-temporal adaptation.
architecture: Improved SatMAE-style masked autoencoding with stronger temporal/spectral reconstruction and transfer.
downstream_tasks: Scene classification, multi-label classification, segmentation, and temporal/multispectral EO transfer tasks.
training_scale: Training scale varies by experiment; exact global token count not reported in source reviewed.
notes: Useful as an improved MAE family member, but not as broadly multimodal as TerraMind/Galileo.

name: Scale-MAE
input_modality: High-resolution optical remote-sensing images with scale/GSD metadata.
architecture: Masked autoencoder with scale-aware positional encoding; ViT backbone adapted for different spatial resolutions.
downstream_tasks: Scene classification, semantic segmentation, instance/object detection, and transfer to high-resolution RS benchmarks.
training_scale: Pretrained on large high-resolution remote-sensing imagery; exact token count not reported in public abstract/source reviewed.
fm_strength: Partial / strong for optical HR imagery
notes: Good for spatial-scale robustness; less multimodal.

name: CROMA
input_modality: Sentinel-1 SAR and Sentinel-2 multispectral optical imagery.
architecture: Contrastive Radar-Optical Masked Autoencoder; dual-modality pretraining with radar-optical alignment.
downstream_tasks: Land-cover mapping/classification, crop mapping, flood mapping, burn scar/segmentation, and transfer to GEO-Bench/PANGAEA-style tasks.
training_scale: Pretrained on large aligned Sentinel-1/Sentinel-2 pairs; exact token count not reported in source reviewed.
notes: Important radar-optical baseline.

name: SkySense
input_modality: Multimodal remote-sensing imagery including optical, SAR, multispectral/time-series and high-resolution imagery.
architecture: Large multimodal RSFM with modular backbones that can be combined or used independently.
downstream_tasks: 16 datasets over 7 tasks; representative tasks include scene classification, land-use/land-cover classification, semantic segmentation, object detection, change detection, crop/agricultural mapping, and disaster/environmental monitoring.
training_scale: Reported as a billion-scale model pretrained on a curated multimodal RSI dataset of about 21.5M images.
openness_text: Partial/open: repository available; check exact pretrained-weight availability/licensing.
notes: One of the earlier large multimodal RSFMs.

name: SkySense++
input_modality: Multimodal remote-sensing images; expanded multimodal corpus relative to SkySense.
architecture: Scaled-up SkySense-style multimodal RSFM.
downstream_tasks: Reported to improve across 12 EO tasks. Representative task families: classification, segmentation, object detection, change detection, crop/agriculture, disaster/environment monitoring.
training_scale: Secondary sources report around 27M multimodal images; exact tokens not reported.
openness_text: Partial / unclear: verify official checkpoint status before use.
notes: Included because it appears in 2025/2026 surveys, but source details need careful paper verification.

name: SkySense V2
input_modality: Unified multimodal remote-sensing inputs with varying resolutions and modality prompts.
architecture: Single Transformer backbone; adaptive patch merging, learnable modality prompt tokens, MoE module, SSL tailored for RS images.
downstream_tasks: 16 datasets over 7 tasks; task families include scene classification, land-cover/land-use classification, semantic segmentation, object detection, change detection, crop/agricultural mapping, and disaster/environmental applications.
training_scale: Exact token count not in public abstract; model reports broad multimodal pretraining and average improvement over SkySense.
openness_text: Partial / likely open paper; verify code/weights status.
notes: Good row for newest SkySense family; avoid merging with original SkySense.

name: SpectralGPT
input_modality: Spectral / multispectral / hyperspectral remote-sensing images; supports varying image size, resolution, time series, and regions.
architecture: 3D generative pretrained Transformer/GPT for spatial-spectral token generation and multi-target reconstruction.
downstream_tasks: Four downstream tasks: single-label scene classification, multi-label scene classification, semantic segmentation, and change detection.
training_scale: Trained on 1M spectral RS images; models over 600M parameters.
openness_text: Open source / partial: paper and some implementations/checkpoints; verify official checkpoint license.
notes: Strong if your table covers spectral FMs; less multimodal across sensors.

name: SpectralEarth
input_modality: Hyperspectral EnMAP imagery, multi-temporal patches.
architecture: Hyperspectral FM suite using SSL backbones plus spectral adapters.
downstream_tasks: Four downstream datasets for land-cover and crop-type mapping; cross-sensor generalization and HSI classification/segmentation tasks.
training_scale: 538,974 image patches, 415,153 unique locations, >11,636 EnMAP scenes over 2 years; 17.5% multi-temporal locations.
openness_text: Open source planned/reported: dataset, models and code to be made public.
notes: Important HSI-specific foundation model/dataset row.

name: HyperSIGMA
input_modality: Hyperspectral imagery.
architecture: Hyperspectral foundation model with spectral-spatial representation learning, adapted from vision foundation techniques.
downstream_tasks: Hyperspectral classification, segmentation, target/anomaly detection and transfer across HSI datasets.
training_scale: Large HSI pretraining corpus; exact public token count not reported in reviewed source.
notes: Include as HSI branch; verify exact task list from paper for publication.

name: S2MAE
input_modality: Sentinel-2 multispectral imagery.
architecture: Sentinel-2 masked autoencoder with spectral-aware patch masking/reconstruction.
downstream_tasks: Land-cover classification, scene classification, semantic segmentation and Sentinel-2 transfer tasks.
training_scale: Pretraining scale not clearly reported in registry source; token count not reported.
notes: Sensor-specific MAE baseline.

name: SeCo
input_modality: Multispectral Sentinel-2 image time series.
architecture: Seasonal contrastive self-supervised learning using temporal views of the same location.
downstream_tasks: Scene classification, land-cover mapping, crop classification, and transfer to downstream RS tasks.
training_scale: Large unlabeled Sentinel-2 time-series pretraining; exact token count not in source reviewed.
notes: Important predecessor, but not always counted as a full FM under strict modern definitions.

name: SatlasPretrain / SatlasNet
input_modality: Global satellite imagery, mainly optical/multispectral, with labels from a large geospatial atlas.
architecture: Large-scale pretraining for geospatial computer vision; multitask supervised/self-supervised components depending on version.
downstream_tasks: Object detection, land-cover/land-use classification, segmentation, building/road/solar/wind and other map-feature extraction tasks.
training_scale: Large global Satlas corpus; exact token count not reported in the same way as TerraMind.
openness_text: Open source / partial: datasets/models available with license constraints.
fm_strength: Strong geospatial CV FM / partial EO FM
notes: Excellent for map-feature extraction, less universal multimodal EO.

name: GFM / Billion-scale RSFM
input_modality: High-resolution optical remote-sensing imagery.
architecture: Scaled ViT foundation model family, including 86M, 605M, 1.3B, and 2.4B parameter models.
downstream_tasks: Rotated object detection on DOTA v2.0 and DIOR-R; semantic segmentation on Potsdam and LoveDA.
training_scale: Model sizes 86M, 605M, 1.3B, 2.4B parameters; exact image/token count not in abstract snippet reviewed.
openness_text: Open source / partial: verify exact weight release.
notes: Scale study more than a broad multimodal EO model.

name: MMEarth / MP-MAE
input_modality: 12+ multimodal EO/geospatial modalities depending on dataset version; optical imagery with auxiliary geospatial modalities.
architecture: Multi-Pretext Masked Autoencoder using ConvNeXt V2; learns optical representations from multimodal pretext tasks.
downstream_tasks: Image classification and semantic segmentation; also used/extended in MMEarth-Bench for five multimodal environmental tasks.
training_scale: MMEarth pretraining dataset: 1.2M global locations. MMEarth-Bench: five tasks, 12 modalities, global in-/out-of-distribution splits.
openness_text: Open source / partial: dataset/code/project resources linked.
notes: More a model+dataset pretext framework than a single widely deployed checkpoint.

name: OmniSat
input_modality: Aligned EO modalities: multispectral optical, SAR, aerial/spot time-series depending on augmented datasets.
architecture: Self-supervised modality fusion architecture that merges diverse EO modalities using alignment.
downstream_tasks: Three named task groups: forestry, land-cover classification, and crop mapping.
training_scale: Creates two multimodal datasets by augmenting existing datasets; exact token count not reported in abstract.
openness_text: Open source: code and datasets available.
notes: Good multimodal fusion baseline.

name: Presto
input_modality: Pixel-level remote-sensing time series; multisensor tabular/time-series EO variables.
architecture: Lightweight transformer for remote-sensing time series.
downstream_tasks: Segmentation, multilabel scene classification, regression, and globally distributed tasks; used for crop, land-cover, biomass/agriculture-like time-series applications.
training_scale: Designed to be lightweight. Exact token count not reported in summary; trained on remote-sensing pixel time-series.
notes: Not image-patch FM in the same sense as TerraMind, but very useful operationally.

name: EarthPT
input_modality: Optical spectral surface reflectance sequences over 400–2300 nm; temporal EO forecasting data.
architecture: Autoregressive decoding Transformer around 700M parameters; learns to forecast future pixel-level surface reflectances.
downstream_tasks: Dynamic land-use classification and temporally aware EO prediction/forecasting tasks.
training_scale: 700M parameters; paper describes very large potential token space, but exact realized token count should be verified from full paper.
notes: More forecasting-oriented than segmentation benchmark-oriented.

name: EarthMAE / EarthView
input_modality: Hyperspectral, multispectral, topographical, segmentation maps, and temporal structure from NEON/Sentinel/Satellogic.
architecture: Masked autoencoder for multimodal EarthView dataset.
downstream_tasks: Downstream remote-sensing tasks over Satellogic/NEON/Sentinel imagery; land-cover/segmentation-style adaptation.
training_scale: EarthView spans about 15 tera-pixels from NEON, Sentinel, and 1 m Satellogic imagery from 2017–2022.
notes: Include mainly as an important dataset-backed MAE effort.

name: TerraFM
input_modality: Globally distributed Sentinel-1 SAR and Sentinel-2 optical imagery, with land-cover-aware sampling.
architecture: Scalable self-supervised model using radar/optical as natural augmentations; modality-specific encoders and shared representation.
downstream_tasks: Scene classification, semantic segmentation, and transfer to land-cover/environmental tasks reported in paper.
training_scale: Globally distributed S1/S2 imagery with large spatial tiles; exact token count not reported in abstract.
notes: Good for S1/S2 multimodal transfer.

name: THOR
input_modality: Copernicus Sentinel-1, Sentinel-2, Sentinel-3 OLCI, and Sentinel-3 SLSTR at native 10 m to 1000 m resolutions.
architecture: Compute-adaptive foundation model; randomized patch and image-size pretraining; flexible patch-size inference without retraining.
downstream_tasks: PANGAEA-style downstream climate and society applications; strong in data-limited 10% split. Task families include land-cover, crop, flood, burn scar, marine/debris, and environmental monitoring.
training_scale: Pretrained on THOR Pretrain, a new large-scale multi-sensor dataset. Exact token count not reported in abstract.
openness_text: Open/partial: verify released code/weights after paper publication.
notes: Very new 2026 model, important for native-resolution flexibility.

name: OlmoEarth
input_modality: Multimodal spatio-temporal EO imagery and auxiliary geospatial modalities.
architecture: Stable latent image modeling for multimodal Earth observation.
downstream_tasks: Embeddings evaluated on 24 tasks; full fine-tuning reported on 29 tasks, including classification, segmentation, regression, and mapping applications. Exact task list should be checked against the paper when needed.
training_scale: To be verified from the paper; source code, training data, and pretrained weights are reported as available.
openness_text: Open source: code, training data, and pretrained weights reported available.
notes: Important open multimodal EO foundation model. Full task names should be verified before using the count in a publication table.

name: SatMamba
input_modality: High-resolution remote-sensing imagery, including long multiband/multitemporal sequences.
architecture: Masked-autoencoding framework with State Space Model/Mamba backbone for linear scaling.
downstream_tasks: High-resolution imagery tasks: classification, segmentation, object detection/change style transfer tasks, depending on benchmark.
training_scale: Exact token count not reported in abstract; designed for long EO sequences where ViT quadratic scaling is costly.
openness_text: Open source: code available in HRSFM repository.
notes: Architecture alternative to ViT/MAE.

name: SARATR-X
input_modality: Synthetic Aperture Radar imagery.
architecture: SAR-specialized foundation model, likely Transformer/MAE-style depending on variant.
downstream_tasks: SAR classification, detection, segmentation and transfer tasks.
training_scale: Training scale not available from registry source reviewed.
notes: Verify paper before using in a formal exhaustive table.

name: SARMAE
input_modality: Synthetic Aperture Radar imagery.
architecture: SAR-specific masked autoencoder.
downstream_tasks: SAR image classification, target recognition, segmentation/change tasks.
training_scale: Training scale not reported in registry source reviewed.
notes: Included from latest RSFM registry.

name: Complex SAR FM
input_modality: Complex-valued SAR / PolSAR-like data.
architecture: Complex-valued foundation model architecture for SAR representations.
downstream_tasks: SAR classification, segmentation and target/land-cover analysis.
training_scale: Training scale not reported in registry source reviewed.
notes: Highly relevant to complex-valued SAR, but source-specific verification needed.

name: CrossEarth-SAR
input_modality: SAR plus cross-modal/cross-domain EO data.
architecture: Cross-modal SAR representation learning / foundation model.
downstream_tasks: SAR classification, segmentation, detection and cross-modal transfer tasks.
training_scale: Training scale not reported in registry source reviewed.
notes: Registry-listed; needs full paper check before claiming exact tasks.

name: RingMo
input_modality: Remote-sensing imagery, mainly optical/high-resolution imagery.
architecture: Masked image modeling with ring-shaped masking strategy for RS images.
downstream_tasks: Scene classification, object detection, semantic segmentation, and RS transfer tasks.
training_scale: Training scale varies by paper/version; exact token count not reported in registry source.
notes: Important Chinese RSFM family; later variants include RingMo-Sense, RingMo-Aerial, RingMoE, RingMamba.

name: RingMo-Sense
input_modality: Remote-sensing imagery, broader sensor support than original RingMo.
architecture: RingMo-family masked modeling for RS data.
downstream_tasks: Classification, detection, segmentation, and change/land-cover transfer tasks.
training_scale: Training scale not reported in registry source reviewed.
notes: Registry-listed RingMo family variant.

name: RingMo-Aerial
input_modality: Aerial/high-resolution optical imagery.
architecture: RingMo-family aerial-image foundation model.
downstream_tasks: Aerial scene classification, object detection, segmentation and mapping tasks.
training_scale: Training scale not reported in registry source reviewed.
notes: Useful if your definition includes aerial RS.

name: RingMoE
input_modality: Remote-sensing imagery, multimodal/mixture expert variants.
architecture: Mixture-of-experts extension in RingMo family.
downstream_tasks: Classification, detection, segmentation and RS transfer tasks.
training_scale: Training scale not reported in registry source reviewed.
notes: Registry-listed variant; needs full paper verification.

name: RingMamba
input_modality: Remote-sensing imagery.
architecture: Mamba/state-space inspired RingMo-family architecture.
downstream_tasks: Classification, segmentation, detection and transfer tasks.
training_scale: Training scale not reported in registry source reviewed.
notes: Architecture-diversity row.

name: AgriFM
input_modality: Multi-source temporal remote-sensing data for agriculture, likely optical/SAR/time-series depending on dataset.
architecture: Agriculture-focused temporal RS foundation model.
downstream_tasks: Crop mapping, crop-type classification, field/agricultural segmentation and agriculture monitoring.
training_scale: Training scale not reported in registry source reviewed.
notes: Strong domain specialization but narrower than general EO FMs.

name: Panopticon
input_modality: Remote-sensing imagery; likely high-resolution optical with dense labels.
architecture: General RS visual foundation/pretraining model.
downstream_tasks: Classification, segmentation, detection and panoptic-style RS tasks.
training_scale: Training scale not reported in registry source reviewed.
notes: Registry-listed, source-specific details need verification.

name: MAESTRO
input_modality: Remote-sensing imagery and/or time-series depending on version.
architecture: Masked/self-supervised EO representation model.
downstream_tasks: Classification, segmentation and transfer tasks.
training_scale: Training scale not reported in registry source reviewed.
notes: Registry-listed; fill exact tasks after full paper reading.

name: MTP
input_modality: Remote-sensing imagery and temporal data.
architecture: Multi-task/multi-temporal pretraining architecture.
downstream_tasks: Classification, segmentation, detection/change and temporal transfer tasks.
training_scale: Training scale not reported in registry source reviewed.
notes: Registry-listed; not enough public summary detail for exact token count.

name: RS-DFM
input_modality: Remote-sensing collaborative perception data; aerial/drone-style multimodal scenes.
architecture: Distributed foundation model for collaborative remote-sensing perception.
downstream_tasks: AirCo-MultiTasks: 3D object detection, instance segmentation, and trajectory prediction.
training_scale: Training scale not reported in abstract snippet reviewed.
notes: More collaborative perception than classic satellite EO.

name: OReole-FM
input_modality: Remote-sensing imagery, likely optical multispectral/high-resolution.
architecture: Optical RS foundation model; masked/contrastive pretraining family.
downstream_tasks: Classification, detection, segmentation and transfer tasks.
training_scale: Training scale not reported in registry source reviewed.
notes: Registry-listed.

name: SatVision-TOA
input_modality: Top-of-atmosphere satellite imagery.
architecture: Foundation model for satellite imagery at TOA level.
downstream_tasks: Classification, segmentation and transfer tasks for raw/TOA-like satellite data.
training_scale: Training scale not reported in registry source reviewed.
notes: Potentially important for physical/preprocessing-aware EO.

name: WV-Net
input_modality: WorldView/high-resolution commercial satellite imagery.
architecture: High-resolution satellite foundation/pretraining model.
downstream_tasks: Object detection, segmentation, scene classification and high-resolution mapping.
training_scale: Training scale not reported in registry source reviewed.
notes: Include if commercial/high-res EO is in scope.

name: SUMMIT
input_modality: Remote-sensing imagery; likely multimodal or multiscale visual inputs.
architecture: Self-supervised/multimodal RS foundation model.
downstream_tasks: Classification, segmentation, detection/change transfer tasks.
training_scale: Training scale not reported in registry source reviewed.
notes: Registry-listed; exact details need full paper verification.

name: ESFM
input_modality: Earth-system heterogeneous data: climate/weather grids, satellite data with missing values, station data and other spatio-temporal variables.
architecture: Earth System Foundation Model built on 3D Swin UNet/Aurora-style backbone with missing-data and heterogeneous-data extensions.
downstream_tasks: Forecasting, climate/weather downstream applications, downscaling/assimilation-style tasks and heterogeneous Earth-system modeling.
training_scale: Exact token count not reported in abstract. Fully open model announced; Earth-system rather than pure EO imagery.
notes: Include in an appendix or separate section if your table is strictly EO satellite imagery.

name: Prithvi WxC
input_modality: Weather and climate variables from reanalysis/observation datasets, not primarily satellite imagery.
architecture: 2.3B parameter weather/climate foundation model.
downstream_tasks: Autoregressive forecasting, downscaling, gravity wave flux parameterization, and extreme-event applications.
training_scale: 2.3B parameters; trained on large weather/climate data such as MERRA-2 variables.
openness_text: Open source / partial: Hugging Face resources reported.
notes: Useful for EO+climate table but separate from visual EO FMs.

name: RemoteCLIP
input_modality: Image-text remote-sensing pairs; optical RS images plus captions/text.
architecture: CLIP-style contrastive vision-language model.
downstream_tasks: Image-text retrieval, zero-shot scene classification, caption-aligned RS search, visual-language transfer.
training_scale: Training scale varies by dataset; exact token/image count not in registry source reviewed.
notes: Not a pure visual EO FM; include if language-capable FMs are in scope.

name: GeoRSCLIP
input_modality: Remote-sensing imagery plus geospatial text/captions.
architecture: CLIP-style geospatial contrastive pretraining.
downstream_tasks: Zero-shot classification, image-text retrieval, cross-modal search and representation transfer.
training_scale: Training scale not reported in registry source reviewed.
notes: Good for language-aligned EO retrieval.

name: SkyCLIP
